'''Nazzer''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] for the [[Crimson Nova]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
During a [[Battle of Null (Crimson Nova)|battle on Null]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Nazzer, along with several other bounty hunters, attacked the [[T'ra Saa/Legends|T'ra Saa]] and [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] while they were trying to heal wounded friars. Nazzer and his party managed to kill several Jedi and conquer T'ra Saa's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. When Nazzer took the lightsaber, he left the scene again and went to the space station Rig in Steness knot to pick up his premium from the bounty hunter [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]]. As proof that his headhunt for the Jedi was successful, Nazzer introduced the lightsaber of T'ra Saa.

With the Jedi unable to tolerate the bounty hunters' guild raising a catch prize, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]], [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]], and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] went to the [[Crimson Nova]] space station to capture the bounty hunter's client and have him delivered to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When Mika heard about this Jedi attack plan, she put the rig on alert and doubled the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the Jedi. When Nazza met in the hangar of the station Mace Windu, he tried to kill the Jedi Master to secure the premium, but was killed by Windu's lightsaber.
